# PhD & Postdoc Position Finder

> Academic job board aggregating PhD, postdoc, and research positions from Bluesky social network.

## What This Site Does

This site collects and displays academic job postings from Bluesky (social network).
Posts are filtered using AI (Llama) to identify genuine position announcements.
Data is updated daily via automated pipelines.

## Content

- PhD Student positions
- Postdoc positions
- Master Student positions
- Research Assistant positions

## Disciplines Covered

Computer Science, Biology, Chemistry & Materials Science, Physics, Mathematics,
Medicine, Psychology, Economics, Linguistics, History, Sociology & Political Science,
Arts & Humanities, Education, and more.

## URLs

- Main page (interactive): https://eydlinilya.github.io/BlueSky-PhD-jobs/
- All positions (static): https://eydlinilya.github.io/BlueSky-PhD-jobs/positions.html
- Source code: https://github.com/EydlinIlya/BlueSky-PhD-jobs
